ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data point */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the market data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the market data point */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the market data point */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the market data point */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the market data point */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the market data point */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "market" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., stock prices, trading volumes) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the dataset */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was assigned */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the versioned report file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the versioned report file in bytes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report version (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the versioned dataset file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the versioned dataset file in bytes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset version (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_history_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
